headline: Ohio State Aims to Capitalize on Struggling Colorado Squad
subhead: The Buckeyes welcome an injury-plagued Buffaloes team seeking any spark.

xFactor.why: Colorado's quarterback must limit turnovers and sustain drives to keep pace with Ohio State's talent advantage.

keyMatchup: Ohio State's defensive line versus Colorado's offensive line will determine whether the Buffaloes can establish any consistency in the run game.
body: Colorado arrives in Columbus riding a two-game skid, most recently falling to Oklahoma in a defensive struggle that underscored the Buffaloes' offensive limitations. At 1-6, this program is fighting for relevance down the stretch, and the task only gets harder facing a Buckeyes team that just survived Miami in a shootout. The staff's adjustments to shore up pass protection and establish rhythm will be critical; without them, Ohio State's pass rush could make this a long afternoon.

Ohio State's recent victory over Miami, despite defensive lapses, showed this team can win in multiple ways. The Buckeyes' offense has proven capable of moving the ball vertically and controlling tempo, which should present problems for a Colorado secondary already stretched thin. If Ohio State's defense stays disciplined and avoids big plays, the gap in roster quality should widen as the game progresses.
